name: vikunja-mcp
description: Manage a Vikunja instance — tasks, projects, Kanban boards, labels, and filters — from your AI assistant.
long_description: MCP server for Vikunja task management. Create and update tasks, organize projects and hierarchies, manage Kanban boards (columns/buckets and task placement), apply column templates, and run saved filters. Fork of democratize-technology/vikunja-mcp with the vikunja_kanban tool and reliability fixes.

vikunja_url.title: Vikunja API URL
vikunja_url.description: Your Vikunja instance's API base URL, including /api/v1 — e.g. https://vikunja.example.com/api/v1

api_token.title: API token or JWT
api_token.description: A tk_ API token (Vikunja → Settings → API Tokens) or a JWT. A JWT additionally enables the user and export tools.
